title: psyllium euphraticum
intro: Psyllium euphraticum, also known as the Indian senna or Psyllium, is a plant-based fiber supplement derived from the seeds of the Plantago ovata plant. The medicinal properties of Psyllium euphraticum lie in its ability to absorb water and expand, making it a natural laxative and helping to soften and move stool through the digestive system. The health benefits of Psyllium euphraticum include regulating bowel movements, reducing symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS), and lowering cholesterol levels, making it a popular natural remedy for digestive health. Herbal preparations of Psyllium euphraticum include capsules, powders, and granules, which can be consumed with water to support digestive health and prevent constipation.
